sglang.title: Fix multi-tokenizer batch request output routing (health stuck at 503)
sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
In multi-http-worker mode (--tokenizer-worker-num > 1), generate_request called _init_req_state(obj) before _attach_multi_http_worker_info(obj).
For a batch request, _init_req_state accesses obj[i], and GenerateReqInput.getitem builds and CACHES the per-index sub-objects (in _sub_obj_cache), copying

sglang.title: [core] Compute token_type_ids in ForwardBatch.init_new
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Move the cross-encoder token_type_ids device-tensor build out of ScheduleBatch.prepare_for_extend into ForwardBatch.init_new, so the H2D runs on the forward stream and SB no longer carries a forward-only field. Build expression is unchanged; same data-driven gate (any(r.token_type_ids)).

sglang.title: Skip flaky mamba extra_buffer disagg test
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
TestDisaggregationHybridAttentionMambaExtraBuffer.test_gsm8k is flaky and blocks unrelated PRs. The regression is upstream and tracked at #15829 (comment) (repro shows score collapses to 0.82 → 0.70 on retry when the test runs after another class in the same Python process; isolated runs

sglang.title: [mem_cache][1/N] refactor: split allocator.py into allocator/ subpackage
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
First PR of the issue #25371 (parent: #24335) allocator-promotion series. Splits allocator.py into a dedicated allocator/ subpackage with one file per family, per the parent issue's design rule.
Follow-up PRs in this series will move SWATokenToKVPoolAllocator/HiSparse allocator/mamba allo

sglang.title: [CI] Bump xeon PR test unit tests timeout to 60 minutes
sglang.author: 1pikachu
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The Run unit tests step in pr-test-xeon.yml occasionally hits the 36-minute step timeout on the xeon-gnr runner, causing spurious CI failures unrelated to test correctness. Bump the timeout to 60 minutes.

sglang.title: [tokenizer] Surface scheduler load info (num_running_reqs / num_waiting_reqs) in meta_info
sglang.author: brucechanglongxu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The scheduler already piggy-backs per-DP-rank load metrics (GetLoadsReqOutput) on every BatchStrOutput / BatchTokenIDOutput via the recv_obj.load field, but TokenizerManager._handle_batch_output forwards that info only to the dp-balance WatchLoadUpdateReq path. The per-request meta_info d

sglang.title: Add random-ids dataset, round-robin expert simulation, and kill_process_tree logging
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add random-ids as a supported dataset option in bench_one_batch_server_internal for benchmarking with pre-generated token IDs.
Add SGLANG_SIMULATE_ROUND_ROBIN_EXPERTS env var for deterministic expert assignment in MoE layers, useful for reproducible benchmarking with dummy/random weights. M

sglang.title: [diffusion] CI: Infer diffusion test sampling params from task type
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Allow diffusion test cases to omit sampling_params and infer the shared test sampling template from ModelTaskType.
Resolve explicit --pipeline-class-name before model registry lookup, so custom pipeline cases use the correct task type.
Let ltx_2_3_hq_pipeline infer TI2V_sampling_params inst

sglang.title: Fix weights_checker checksum for 0-dim tensors and multi-GPU
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix _as_uint32_words and tensor_hash to use .reshape(-1) before .view(torch.uint8) so 0-dim tensors don't raise errors.
Add per_gpu_checksum field to ChecksumInfo for a single overall hash per GPU, computed from sorted parameter checksums.
Aggregate per-GPU checksums into per_engine_checksu

Fixes #43309.
Purpose

vllm.title: [Misc] Use VLLMValidationError consistently in chat completion and completion protocol validators
vllm.author: umut-polat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Replaces ValueError with VLLMValidationError in chat completion and completion protocol validators, adding parameter fields for better error diagnostics.
Also fixes unreachable dead code in check_structured_outputs_count: the second condition used count > 1 (already caught by the first check

vllm.title: [MRV2] Remove Eagle's dedicated CUDA graph pool
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The initial MRV2 eagle support (#29559) used a separate graph pool for eagle from the main model.
#35959 carried that behavior forward (with a somewhat misleading comment)
This doesnt actually appear to be required; we can save memory by making the main model and eagle share a graph memory pool
Test

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix `_has_module` to verify native deps via trial import
vllm.author: jeffreywang88
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Original PR: #39873.

_has_module relied solely on importlib.util.find_spec(), which only confirms a module's spec exists on disk — not that it can actually be imported.
For native-extension packages with missing shared libraries (e.g. nixl_ep without libcudart.so.12), find_spec returns a va

vllm.title: [CPU][RISC-V] Add missing RVV cpu_types helpers for WNA16
vllm.author: wcynb1023
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fills missing RISC-V RVV cpu_types helpers that are required by the CPU WNA16 path.
The x86 CPU vector types already provide helpers used by WNA16 dequantization and AMX/VEC dispatch paths. The RISC-V RVV implementation was missing equivalent support, which prevented GPTQ/WNA16 CPU e
